pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Technical Foundations KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.378) to justify inclusion for the Director of Data Quality. Without stronger framework alignment, this skill KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain skill KSA be expected in real-world Director of Data Quality roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for Director of Data Quality roles increasingly include Technical Foundations competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for Director of Data Quality now include Technical Foundations competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Technical Foundations skill KSA is relevant to the Director of Data Quality based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
